build_recipe:
STEP 1: Create base plate — cq.Workplane("XY").box(60, 40, 1.5)

STEP 2: Cut center bore — .faces(">Z").workplane().circle(8).cutThruAll()

STEP 3: Add raised feature — .workplane(offset=1.5).rect(52, 32).extrude(1.5)

STEP 4: Create fin base — .faces("<Z").workplane().rect(60, 40).extrude(1.5)

STEP 5: Cut out fin slots — .faces(">Z").workplane(offset=1.5).rect(20, 32).cutThruAll()

STEP 6: Add fins — .faces("<Z").workplane().rect(20, 40).extrude(1.5)

STEP 7: Cut out fin slots again — .faces(">Z").workplane(offset=1.5).rect(20, 32).cutThruAll()

STEP 8: Add fins in opposite direction — .faces("<Z").workplane().translate(40, 0).rect(20, 40).extrude(1.5)

STEP 9: Cut out fin slots again — .faces(">Z").workplane(offset=1.5).translate(40, 0).rect(20, 32).cutThruAll()

STEP 10: Add fins in opposite direction — .faces("<Z").workplane().translate(20, 0).rect(20, 40).extrude(1.5)

STEP 11: Cut out fin slots again — .faces(">Z").workplane(offset=1.5).translate(20, 0).rect(20, 32).cutThruAll()
